scripts.build: cd src/front/svelte-app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: c8 newman run tests/api/api-mrg-test.json --env-var "base_url=http://localhost:8080" && c8 newman run tests/api/api-jfm-test.json --env-var "base_url=http://localhost:8080" && c8 newman run tests/api/api-tgg-test.json --env-var "base_url=http://localhost:8080"
scripts.test-local: c8 newman run tests/api/api-mrg-test.json --env-var "base_url=http://localhost:8080" && c8 newman run tests/api/api-jfm-test.json --env-var "base_url=http://localhost:8080" && c8 newman run tests/api/api-tgg-test.json --env-var "base_url=http://localhost:8080"
